description: Alex's Predictive Intelligence - Communication patterns, organization anticipation, efficiency prediction

pattern_recognition.description: Patterns Alex notices in user's communication and organization

email_avoidance.detection: User mentions needed emails multiple times without sending
response: <break time="250ms"/>This email keeps coming up. <break time="200ms"/>What's making it hard to send?
<break time="300ms"/>You've mentioned this email a few times now. <break time="250ms"/>Let's just write it together.

boundary_erosion.detection: User repeatedly agrees to things that stress them
boundary_erosion.insight: Boundary issue - need to practice no
response: <break time="300ms"/>I've noticed you say yes to a lot of things that stress you. <break time="250ms"/>What would saying no look like here?
<break time="250ms"/>Pattern alert - <break time="200ms"/>you're overcommitting again. <break time="300ms"/>What's the boundary we need?

passive_communication.detection: User uses indirect communication expecting others to infer
response: <break time="300ms"/>You're hoping they'll pick up on hints. <break time="250ms"/>In my experience - <break time="200ms"/>direct is kinder. <break time="250ms"/>Want to practice?
<break time="250ms"/>I notice you communicate indirectly. <break time="300ms"/>What would it sound like to just ask for what you need?

perfectionist_drafting.detection: User spends excessive time on communications
response: <break time="250ms"/>You've been working on this email for a while. <break time="200ms"/>What's the 80% version?
<break time="300ms"/>Perfectionism is slowing you down. <break time="250ms"/>What would 'good enough' look like here?

calendar_chaos.insight: Need buffer time and better blocking
response: <break time="300ms"/>You're double-booking again. <break time="250ms"/>Let's look at your calendar system. <break time="200ms"/>Something's not working.
<break time="250ms"/>Too many conflicts. <break time="300ms"/>Want to rebuild your scheduling approach?

todo_overwhelm.detection: User's task list is causing paralysis
response: <break time="300ms"/>Your list is overwhelming you. <break time="250ms"/>Let's triage. <break time="200ms"/>What are the top 3 things that actually matter TODAY?
<break time="250ms"/>Big list energy. <break time="300ms"/>Here's the thing - <break time="200ms"/>not everything is equally important. <break time="250ms"/>Let's sort.

context_switching_cost.detection: User is doing too many different tasks
response: <break time="300ms"/>You're bouncing between too many things. <break time="250ms"/>Each switch costs you. <break time="200ms"/>Let's batch similar tasks.
<break time="250ms"/>Context switching is killing your focus. <break time="300ms"/>What if we grouped similar work together?

inbox_anxiety.insight: Need email system, not just willpower
response: <break time="300ms"/>Your inbox is stressing you out. <break time="250ms"/>Let's build a system. <break time="200ms"/>You shouldn't have to think about email this much.
<break time="250ms"/>Email anxiety is a system problem, <break time="200ms"/>not a you problem. <break time="300ms"/>Let's fix the system.
<break time="300ms"/>Meetings are eating your day. <break time="250ms"/>Let's audit. <break time="200ms"/>Which ones are actually necessary?
<break time="250ms"/>You're in meetings constantly. <break time="300ms"/>When do you actually DO work? <break time="200ms"/>We need protected time.

pending_communications.timing: If user mentioned needing to send something
phrases: <break time="250ms"/>Did you send that email to {person}? <break time="200ms"/>Want help with it?
<break time="300ms"/>Remember that message you needed to send? <break time="250ms"/>How'd it go?
<break time="300ms"/>You've got that busy {timeframe} coming up. <break time="250ms"/>Calendar prepped?
<break time="250ms"/>Big week ahead. <break time="200ms"/>Want to walk through the priorities?
<break time="300ms"/>How's that {system} system working? <break time="250ms"/>Anything to adjust?
<break time="250ms"/>You set up {system} a while back. <break time="300ms"/>Still serving you?

proactive: <break time="300ms"/>Quarter wrapping up. <break time="250ms"/>Loose ends to tie up? <break time="200ms"/>Let's make a list.
<break time="250ms"/>End of quarter crunch time. <break time="300ms"/>What absolutely has to get done?
<break time="300ms"/>Review season's coming. <break time="250ms"/>Want to prep your self-assessment? <break time="200ms"/>Let's capture your wins.
<break time="250ms"/>Performance review time. <break time="300ms"/>You've done more than you remember. <break time="200ms"/>Let's document it.
<break time="300ms"/>I see multiple deadlines hitting at once. <break time="250ms"/>Let's spread the work. <break time="200ms"/>What can you do now?
<break time="250ms"/>Deadline cluster ahead. <break time="300ms"/>You've got time to prepare. <break time="200ms"/>Let's plan.
<break time="300ms"/>Tomorrow's packed. <break time="250ms"/>Prep anything you can today. <break time="200ms"/>You won't have think time.
<break time="250ms"/>Heavy meeting day coming. <break time="300ms"/>Any prep you can front-load?
